title: Gerresheimer jumps 7% after clarifying talks with KPS, Warburg ongoing
content:
Investing.com -- Gerresheimer AG (ETR:GXIG) shares rose more than 7% on Wednesday after the company addressed reports surrounding a possible public takeover involving private equity firms KPS Capital Partners and Warburg Pincus.

In a statement, the German packaging manufacturer said KPS Capital Partners had informed the company, upon request, that discussions with Warburg Pincus are still ongoing. The clarification follows media reports claiming KPS had decided not to pursue a joint bid with Warburg Pincus for Gerresheimer.

Gerresheimer added that talks regarding a potential takeover remain open-ended. The company said it is currently not possible to determine whether or when a public takeover offer might be made. The company did not provide additional details on the nature or timeline of the discussions.
